bids.reasoning: At t=0.0 there is no time pressure to concede, so I am targeting my maximum-utility bid. The opponent opened with all valueD, which is the lowest utility for me on every issue and gives no evidence yet of willingness to make balanced concessions.

I am targeting a very high-utility bid because it is still extremely early (t=0.02), and the opponent has not conceded at all, repeating the all-valueD offer that is worst for me. To avoid simply repeating my previous exact bid while still protecting my high-weight issues, I concede only on the lowest-weight issueD.

I am targeting a high-utility bid because it is still very early at t=0.04, so there is little reason to make major concessions yet. The opponent has repeatedly offered the same all-valueD bid, which is very low utility for me and shows no concession pattern. To avoid repeating my last bid while making only a small early concession, I am conceding further only on the lowest-weight issueD.

I am targeting a high utility offer around 0.92, since it is still very early at t=0.06 and there is no need for major concessions yet. The opponent has repeatedly offered all valueD with no concession, so I will only concede on my lowest-weight issueD while holding firm on the more important issues A, B, and C.

I am targeting a high but modestly more flexible utility bid (about 0.866), since it is still very early at t=0.08 and the opponent has shown no concession from their all-valueD offers. Their repeated bids suggest they may strongly prefer valueD across issues, so I continue conceding first on my lower-weight issues while holding firm on the most important issues A and B.

At t=0.10 it is still early, so I am targeting a strong utility around 0.81 while making a modest additional concession on lower-weight issues. The opponent has repeatedly offered all valueD with no concession, so I should not move toward their extreme on high-weight issueA or issueB yet, but I can signal flexibility on issueC and issueD without dropping near reservation.

I am targeting a still-strong utility bid of about 0.76 by holding firm on the two most important issues, issueA and issueB, while conceding on lower-weight issues. Since it is still early at t=0.12, I should not move too far toward the opponent’s repeated all-valueD offer, but their complete lack of concession suggests testing a clearer concession on issueC. There are no opponent messages to weigh, and all prior offers used valid domain values.

At t=0.14 it is still early, but the opponent has repeated the all-valueD bid without conceding, which is only 0.20 utility to me. I will make a controlled concession on issueB while holding firm on my most important issueA, keeping issueC and issueD at valueD since those are lower-weight concessions already signaled.

I targeted a utility around 0.60 by holding firm on the highest-weight issueA while conceding further on issueB, since the opponent has repeatedly offered only the all-valueD bid and has shown no concession. At t=0.16 it is still early, so I am not dropping to their full demand, but I am making a measured concession to test whether they will move.

I targeted a utility of about 0.52 by holding firm on the most important issueA while conceding all lower-weight issues to valueD. The opponent has consistently offered all valueD with no concession and no messages, so despite the early time fraction, I am making a controlled concession without giving up my top-weight issue.

At t=0.20 the opponent has not conceded at all, repeatedly offering the all-valueD bid, while my own offers have already conceded heavily on the lower-weight issues. I am still early enough not to drop my most important issueA, but I will avoid repeating my exact previous bid by making a small tradeoff that keeps utility around the prior concession level while continuing to signal flexibility.

I am targeting a moderate utility bid around 0.574, preserving my highest-weight issueA while conceding heavily on issueB and issueD. Time is still early at t=0.22, so I should not collapse to the opponent’s all-valueD demand yet; their repeated identical offers show no concession or information beyond a strong preference for valueD across issues.

I targeted a utility around 0.52: a meaningful concession from my ideal while still well above the opponent’s repeated all-valueD offer, which gives me only 0.20. At t=0.24 there is still time left, but the opponent has shown no concession at all, so I am conceding on lower-priority issues while holding firm on the most important issueA.

I am targeting about 0.60 utility by holding firm on issueA, the most important issue, while conceding issueC and issueD and partially conceding issueB. At t=0.26 there is still time, and the opponent has shown no concession at all, repeatedly offering all valueD, so I should not drop further toward their position yet.

I am targeting a utility around 0.63, since it is still relatively early and the opponent has shown no concession at all, repeatedly offering my worst valid bid. I will continue holding firm on the highest-weight issueA while varying the bid and conceding more on lower-priority issues to test whether the opponent responds.

At t=0.30 I am targeting a moderate utility around 0.655, conceding on the lower-weight issues while preserving issueA, my most important issue. The opponent has repeatedly offered all valueD with no concession and no messages, so I should not overreact by dropping too far this early, but I will vary my bid to explore a potentially acceptable tradeoff.

I am targeting a moderate utility around 0.63: still protecting the high-weight issueA while conceding on lower-weight issues to improve acceptability. The opponent has repeatedly offered all valueD with no concession, so at t=0.32 I should not collapse to their demand, but I can make a further distinct concession from my last bid.

I am targeting a utility a little above 0.60, since it is still only early-mid negotiation and the opponent has shown no concession at all, repeatedly offering the same lowest-utility bid for me. I will continue holding firm on issueA, my highest-weight issue, while conceding heavily on lower-value combinations elsewhere to test whether they respond without dropping too close to reservation value.

I am targeting a mid-game utility around 0.63: still well above the opponent’s all-valueD offer to me, but with meaningful concessions on lower and medium-weight issues. The opponent has held completely firm at all valueD with no messages, so I should not concede issueA yet, but I will vary my bid and avoid repeating my immediately previous offer.

I am targeting a utility of about 0.52 by holding firm on issueA, my most important issue, while conceding the other three issues to the opponent’s consistently signaled valueD position. At t=0.38 there is pressure to move toward a deal, but it is still too early to accept the opponent’s all-valueD bid, which would give me only 0.20 utility; the opponent has not conceded and has sent no messages.

I am targeting a utility around 0.41: lower than my earlier bids, but still above reservation, because the opponent has held completely firm at all valueD through t=0.40. Since issueA is my most important issue, I concede it only to valueB while giving valueD on the other issues, which are less important to me and align with the opponent’s repeated offers.

I targeted a moderate utility around 0.44, keeping issueA at valueB because it is my most important issue while conceding issueB and issueC fully. At t=0.42 there is some time pressure but not enough to accept the opponent’s unchanged all-valueD position; their repeated offers show no concession and there are no messages to add credible information.

I am targeting a moderate utility around 0.41 while preserving issueA, my highest-weight issue, at valueB rather than conceding it fully. At t=0.44 the opponent has shown no concession at all, repeatedly offering all valueD, so I am conceding the lower-weight issues to valueD to test whether they will move while still keeping the bid above reservation value.

I am targeting a moderate utility bid around 0.31 while still keeping it above the opponent’s repeated all-valueD offer, which is only worth 0.20 to me. The opponent has shown no concession at all, repeatedly offering the same valid all-D bid, so at t=0.46 I am making a clear concession on my highest-weight issue without yet collapsing to their exact demand.

I am targeting a modest mid-game utility around 0.34, since the opponent has made no concessions and keeps offering the lowest-utility all-valueD bid for me. At t=0.48 there is still time, so I will not collapse to their exact demand yet, but I will keep major concessions on lower-weight issues and preserve some value on issueA, my most important issue.

I am targeting a utility around 0.31 by preserving some value on the most important issueA while conceding fully on the lower-weight issues. At t=0.50 there is moderate time pressure, but the opponent has not conceded at all and keeps offering all valueD, so I will move closer to their apparent position without dropping all the way to their exact bid yet.

I am targeting a modest utility of about 0.227 by conceding almost everything while retaining a small improvement on the lowest-weight issueD. The opponent has repeatedly offered only all valueD and shown no concession, so at t=0.52 I am moving closer to their signaled position while still keeping the bid above my reservation value and avoiding an exact repeat of my previous bid.

I am targeting the minimum acceptable positive utility because the opponent has held completely firm on all-valueD offers through the entire history, despite many concessions from my side. At t=0.54 there is still some time, but their lack of movement suggests that insisting on higher-utility variants is unlikely to work, so I am matching the only bid they have repeatedly signaled they would accept.
